name: Coconut Shrimp
instructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, leaving the tails on. Pat dry with paper towels. Season with salt and pepper.

2. Set up a breading station: one bowl with flour, one with beaten eggs, and one with a mixture of shredded coconut and breadcrumbs.

3. Dredge each shrimp in flour, shaking off excess. Dip into beaten eggs, then press firmly into the coconut-breadcrumb mixture to coat evenly.

4. Heat oil in a deep pan to 175°C (350°F). You need about 3 cm of oil.

5. Fry the shrimp in batches for 2-3 minutes, turning once, until golden brown and crispy.

6. Drain on paper towels. Serve immediately with pineapple salsa or sweet chili dipping sauce and lime wedges.
simpleInstructions:
1. Pat shrimp dry, season with salt and pepper.

2. Coat shrimp in flour, egg, then coconut-breadcrumb mix.

3. Fry in hot oil 2-3 minutes until golden.

4. Drain on paper towels.

5. Serve with dipping sauce and lime.
